-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade AS stormflo_geom FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"MultiPolygon","coordinates":[[[[5.732421875,57.97346611925839],[5.732421875,58.27093866019948],[6.240234375,58.27093866019948],[6.240234375,57.97346611925839],[5.732421875,57.97346611925839]]]]}'), 4326), 25833))

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
